caption: A man in a dark suit with a white shirt and a maroon tie stands at a podium, speaking in a formal setting. Behind him is a light-colored wall and a large blue and white flag. Water bottles are visible on the table beside him. He alternates between looking down at papers on the podium and looking forward. In one instance, the view shifts to a man in a white button-down shirt who is adjusting his face. Across the bottom of the screen, a news banner reads "FOREIGN NEWS" and "NUCLEAR PROGRAMME," followed by the text "ISRAEL EXPECTS I.A.E.A. TO GIVE IRAN CLEAR WARNING AHEAD." On-screen logos for "plustv" are visible in the top corners, and links for "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" appear alongside "SUBSCRIBE" and "WATCH ONLINE" prompts.
